steps.title: Find total length of the two equal sides
steps.content: Each equal side is 12 ft, so together they measure $$2 \times 12 = 24$$ feet.

steps.title: Subtract from the perimeter to get the third side
steps.content:
Perimeter is 42 ft, so the third side is $$42 - 24 = 18$$ feet.
That confirms C is correct.
